requirements.text: Root AGENTS.md follows the agents.md open format instead of only pointing to .omp/AGENTS.md
requirements.acceptance: Read AGENTS.md and verify it contains project overview, setup commands, code style, testing instructions, and OMP workflow guidance.

requirements.text: /init hydrates root AGENTS.md from detected repo metadata using the existing Phase 2.5 detection path
requirements.acceptance: Read .omp/commands/init.md and verify Phase 2.5 writes root AGENTS.md or replaces exact AGENTS.md template placeholders using project_name, project_desc, package_manager, verification commands, and language data.

requirements.text: /init hydration remains idempotent and does not overwrite user-maintained AGENTS.md content
requirements.acceptance: Run /init or its hydration block twice in a scratch clone and verify the second run reports already-populated or leaves root AGENTS.md unchanged.

requirements.text: README command inventory matches the actual lifecycle command set and explicitly includes npm-release when present
requirements.acceptance: Compare .omp/commands/*.md against README.md and verify the command count and table rows agree, including /npm-release if shipped.

requirements.text: .gitignore keeps br runtime databases and local lock/state files ignored while preserving versioned bead sync data
requirements.acceptance: Read .gitignore and verify beads.db, beads.db-shm, beads.db-wal, .write.lock, and last-touched are ignored, while .beads/issues.jsonl is not ignored.

requirements.text: Python bytecode ignores remain present for command hydration helpers and local execution artifacts
requirements.acceptance: Read .gitignore and verify __pycache__/ and *.pyc are ignored under a clear Python bytecode section.

requirements.text: No workflow phase beyond /create is executed for this bead during this session
requirements.acceptance: Verify the artifact directory contains prd.md, prd.json, and decisions.md only for /create outputs; no plan.md, tasks.md, completion-evidence.json, review-report.md, PR, or closure exists.

success_criteria: /init root AGENTS.md hydration exists in Phase 2.5
README command inventory matches command files
beads runtime ignores preserve versioned sync data
No out-of-scope workflow artifacts were created during /create
PRD and JSON requirements stay synchronized
